question_np: Nepal मा fake diploma mill भनेको के हो?
options_np: Fake degrees बेच्ने institutions — UGC Nepal verify
explanation_np: Diploma mill: degrees/certificates sell without real education। UGC: ugcnepal.edu.np verify।

options_np: Fake accreditation bodies, unrecognized degrees — UGC/NEB verify
explanation_np: Accreditation fraud: fake bodies. UGC Nepal recognized institutions मात्र। ugcnepal.edu.np।

options_np: Bluetooth devices, mobile apps, earpieces — NEB strict measures
explanation_np: Exam technology cheating: electronic devices। NEB: metal detectors, jammers, CCTV।

options_np: Intellectual property theft — institutions: plagiarism software, penalties
explanation_np: Plagiarism: IP theft। Universities: Turnitin, iThenticate software। Penalties।

options_np: Fabricated data, plagiarism — UGC, universities investigate
explanation_np: Research fraud: fabricated/falsified data, plagiarism। UGC Nepal + university oversight।

options_np: Fake medical colleges, unrecognized degrees — NMC + MoE verify
explanation_np: Medical education: NMC recognized colleges मात्र। NMC: nmc.org.np।

options_np: Fake engineering colleges — NEC recognized institutions मात्र
explanation_np: Engineering: NEC (Nepal Engineering Council) recognized colleges मात्र। nec.gov.np।

options_np: Nepal Bar Council recognized law schools — nepalbar.org.np verify
explanation_np: Law education: Nepal Bar Council recognized schools। Degree verify: nepalbar.org.np।

options_np: TSC (Teacher Service Commission) certified teachers मात्र — tsc.gov.np
explanation_np: Teacher certification: TSC: tsc.gov.np। Fake certs: TSC + MoE report।

options_np: Unregistered centers, fake results promises — District Education Office
explanation_np: Coaching center fraud: unregistered, fake guarantee। District Education Office report।

question_np: Nepal मा health insurance claim process?
options_np: Policy document + bills + diagnosis — submit to insurance company directly
explanation_np: Health insurance claim: bills, diagnosis report, policy document — submit directly to insurer।
Pre-existing: must disclose। Non-disclosure = insurance fraud — policy void।

options_np: Beema Samiti: ib.gov.np — licensed agents list
explanation_np: Insurance agent: Beema Samiti: ib.gov.np मा licensed agents directory।

options_np: Fake maturity notices, early surrender pressure — directly company contact
explanation_np: Life insurance: fake maturity notices. Directly insurance company official number contact।

options_np: Ghost members, inflated claims — employer + Beema Samiti oversight
explanation_np: Group insurance: ghost members, false claims। Beema Samiti + employer audit।

options_np: Low value, high volume — identity fraud, false claims। NRB + Beema Samiti
explanation_np: Micro-insurance fraud: identity fraud, false claims। NRB + Beema Samiti oversight।

options_np: Inflated claims, fake ceding — Beema Samiti, international reinsurers
explanation_np: Reinsurance fraud: inflated primary claims। Beema Samiti oversight।

options_np: Beema Samiti — insurance complaints resolution mechanism
explanation_np: Insurance complaints: Beema Samiti: ib.gov.np grievance mechanism। 01-4229873।

options_np: Fake claims (medical, cancellation) — documentation required, verify
explanation_np: Travel insurance fraud: fake medical/cancellation claims। Documentation verify।

options_np: Over/under valuation, fake appraisals — independent valuer, documentation
explanation_np: Property valuation fraud: independent certified valuer use। Documentation maintain।

options_np: Fake drug money transfers, money laundering — Narcotics Control Bureau
explanation_np: Drug trafficking finances: money laundering. Narcotics Control Bureau + Nepal Police।

options_np: Illegal — Army, Police, CIAA + Interpol cooperation
explanation_np: Arms trafficking: Nepal Army, Police, CIAA, Interpol। Serious criminal offense।

options_np: Criminal ले innocent person को account मार्फत money transfer — illegal participant
explanation_np: Money mule: criminals use innocent accounts। Participant = criminal liability। Never agree।

options_np: Account share = crime। 'Processing fees', 'international transfers' = red flags
explanation_np: Money mule: account share गर्नु = crime। 'Earn easy' + account access = criminal।

options_np: FIU Nepal + NRB + Police — terrorism financing prevent
explanation_np: Terrorist financing: FIU Nepal, NRB, Police। Report suspicious transactions immediately।

options_np: Systematic fraud operations — CIB, Nepal Police, Interpol
explanation_np: Organized fraud: systematic operations। CIB: 01-4412548, Nepal Police, Interpol cooperation।

options_np: Threats for money — Nepal Police: 100 immediately report
explanation_np: Extortion: money demand through threats. Nepal Police: 100 immediately।

options_np: Nepal Police: 100 immediately — do not pay without police consultation
explanation_np: Kidnapping: Nepal Police: 100 immediately। Do not pay ransom without police guidance।

options_np: Virtual kidnapping scam — fake emergency, ransom demand। Verify immediately
explanation_np: Cyber kidnapping: fake emergency call + ransom। Immediately call alleged victim directly।

options_np: Business extortion — police protection payment demand। Nepal Police: 100
explanation_np: Protection racket: business threats for payment. Nepal Police: 100 immediately।

options_np: Low ranked — significant corruption challenge। CIAA reform efforts
explanation_np: Nepal Corruption Perception Index (Transparency International): significant challenges। CIAA reform।
UN International Anti-Corruption Day: December 9। Nepal पनि awareness activities।

options_np: Rule of law, transparency, accountability, participation — ongoing reforms
explanation_np: Good governance: rule of law, transparency, accountability, citizen participation।

options_np: Public Procurement Monitoring Office — e-GP system
explanation_np: E-procurement: PPMO (Public Procurement Monitoring Office) e-GP system — transparency।

options_np: Auditor General's Department — government audits annually
explanation_np: Auditor General: government expenditure annual audit। Irregularities Parliament report।

options_np: Parliament — Auditor General reports review, accountability
explanation_np: Public Accounts Committee (PAC): Parliament committee — Auditor General reports review।

options_np: FCG Office — government financial management oversight
explanation_np: Financial Comptroller General: government financial management, internal audit oversight।

options_np: Three tiers: Federal, Provincial, Local — each with budget, accountability
explanation_np: Nepal fiscal federalism: Federal, 7 Provincial, 753 Local governments — each budget, audit।

options_np: Grant misuse, ghost projects — CIAA, Auditor General, local community watch
explanation_np: IGT fraud: grant misuse। CIAA: 1113, Auditor General, local government oversight।

options_np: Citizens right to know — Citizens' Charter, annual reports, public hearings
explanation_np: Local government: Citizens Charter posting, annual reports, public hearings — accountability।

question_np: Nepal को constitution fraud prevention provisions?
options_np: Article 17 (right against exploitation), economic rights, CIAA provisions
explanation_np: Nepal Constitution: right against exploitation, economic rights, CIAA constitutional body।

options_np: Article 18 (equality), Article 19 (expression), Article 31 (education) — fraud prevention base
explanation_np: Fundamental rights: equality, expression, education — fraud prevention foundation।

options_np: Article 25 — property right guarantee, but limitations for public interest
explanation_np: Nepal Constitution Article 25: property right guarantee। Public interest limitations।
Nepal Constitution Article 44: consumer protection explicit constitutional right।

options_np: Article 44 + DPSP — right to employment, food security, social security
explanation_np: Economic rights: employment right, social security, food security — constitutional provisions।

options_np: Policy guidance — state obligations for citizens' welfare
explanation_np: DPSP: not directly enforceable but guide state policy — economic, social justice।

options_np: Writ jurisdiction — Supreme/High Court, illegal detention challenge
explanation_np: Habeas corpus: Supreme/High Court writ jurisdiction। Illegal detention challenge।

options_np: Constitutional provision — wrongfully convicted compensation claim
explanation_np: Wrongful conviction compensation: constitutional provision। Court claim।

question_np: Nepal मा rule of law index?
options_np: Developing — improving but significant challenges remain
explanation_np: Nepal rule of law: developing, improving। World Justice Project ranking: ongoing progress।

question_np: Justice delayed is justice denied — Nepal context?
options_np: Slow courts = fraud victims suffer। Fast-track courts, ADR important
explanation_np: Court delays: fraud victims suffer. Fast-track courts, ADR (mediation, arbitration) important।

question_np: Nepal मा ADR (Alternative Dispute Resolution) methods?
options_np: Mediation, arbitration, negotiation — faster, cheaper, less adversarial
explanation_np: ADR Nepal: mediation, arbitration, negotiation — Arbitration Act, Mediation Act।

options_np: Arbitration Act 2055 — commercial disputes, faster resolution
explanation_np: Nepal Arbitration Act 2055: commercial/contractual disputes। Binding arbitral awards।

options_np: Mediation Act 2068 — civil disputes mediation framework
explanation_np: Nepal Mediation Act 2068: civil dispute mediation। Certified mediators, court-referred।

options_np: Emerging — e-commerce disputes, consumer complaints, evolving
explanation_np: ODR Nepal: emerging for e-commerce disputes। Consumer Forum online mechanisms।

options_np: People's court — minor disputes, community-based resolution
explanation_np: Lok Adalat: community-based dispute resolution। Minor civil disputes।

options_np: District Court — small civil claims jurisdiction
explanation_np: Nepal District Court: civil jurisdiction — small claims no specific monetary limit set। Court discretion।

options_np: Formal written communication — legal action को warning/demand
explanation_np: Legal notice: lawyer मार्फत formal demand/warning — legal action हुने पूर्व notification।

options_np: Illegal activity stop गर्ने court/legal order
explanation_np: Cease and desist: illegal activity stop order — court or lawyer issued।

options_np: Evidence disclosure between parties — Nepal Civil Procedure Code
explanation_np: Discovery: evidence exchange between parties। Nepal Civil Procedure Code provisions।

options_np: Fake court fee stamps — official courts, official channels मात्र
explanation_np: Court fee fraud: fake stamps/receipts। Official court counters मात्र।

options_np: Fake notarization, unauthorized notaries — Supreme Court registered notaries मात्र
explanation_np: Notary: Supreme Court registered public notaries मात्र। Fake notarization: Police + Court।

options_np: Supreme Court, District Courts — registered notaries directory
explanation_np: Registered notaries: Supreme Court र District Court lists।

options_np: Ministry of Foreign Affairs — document apostille (Hague Convention)
explanation_np: Apostille: MoFA Nepal। Hague Convention document authentication।

options_np: MoFA + destination country Embassy — official legalization process
explanation_np: Document legalization: MoFA Nepal + destination Embassy authentication।

options_np: Fake revenue stamps — IRD, local government, Police report
explanation_np: Stamp duty fraud: IRD, local government मा report। Official channels मात्र।

options_np: Fake deeds, forged signatures — Malpot + Police report
explanation_np: Deed fraud: Malpot (Land Revenue Office) + Nepal Police FIR।

options_np: PoA revoke (notary), civil court case, Police FIR — multiple remedies
explanation_np: PoA misuse: notary revoke, District Court civil case, Police FIR।

options_np: Fake wills, forgery — District Court probate, Police FIR
explanation_np: Will fraud: District Court probate challenge, Police FIR for forgery।

options_np: Fake heirs, forged documents — District Court, Police FIR
explanation_np: Inheritance fraud: fake heirs, forgery. District Court + Police FIR।

options_np: Muluki Civil Code 2074 — intestate succession rules
explanation_np: Nepal Muluki Civil Code 2074: inheritance/succession rules — spouse, children, parents।

options_np: Parental abduction, false claims — District Court, police
explanation_np: Child custody fraud: District Court order, Police assistance। Child's best interest।

options_np: False income declaration, evading payment — District Court enforcement
explanation_np: Alimony fraud: District Court enforcement। False income: contempt of court।

options_np: Asset hiding, false claims — District Court, financial disclosure
explanation_np: Divorce fraud: hidden assets. Court-ordered financial disclosure। Lawyer essential।

options_np: Controlling money, denying access, forced signing — Women's Commission, legal aid
explanation_np: Financial abuse: controlling finances, forced signatures. महिला आयोग: 1145, legal aid।

options_np: Dowry, property transfer coercion — Women's Commission, Police
explanation_np: Forced marriage fraud: Women's Commission: 1145, Police: 100। Illegal।

options_np: Property seizure, pension theft, undue influence — Police, legal aid, NHRC
explanation_np: Elder financial abuse: property seizure, pension theft. Police: 100, NHRC, legal aid।

options_np: Fake profiles, advance fee, romance scam — verify before commitment
explanation_np: Matrimony fraud: fake profiles, advance fees. Background verify, Cyber Bureau: 1177।

options_np: Money for 'removing curses', large amounts — psychological manipulation
explanation_np: Astrology fraud: 'curse removal', excessive fees. Psychological manipulation। Police report।

options_np: Fake, money extraction — Medical treatment seek, Police report
explanation_np: Black magic fraud: fake, money extraction. Medical help seek, Police: 100 report।

options_np: Charging excessive for fake advice — verify credentials, second opinion
explanation_np: Vastu fraud: excessive charges, no verifiable credentials. Second opinion seek।

options_np: Multiple cases — Hami Sabai, various cooperatives — thousands affected
explanation_np: Nepal pyramid history: multiple Ponzi/pyramid cases — thousands crores lost।

question_np: Nepal मा major fraud cases history?
options_np: Cooperative frauds, foreign employment scams, land scams — ongoing issue
explanation_np: Nepal major frauds: cooperative collapses, employment fraud, land scams — systemic issue।

options_np: Billions of Rupees lost, development setback, trust erosion — serious impact
explanation_np: Economic impact: billions lost, development funds diverted, institutional trust damaged।

options_np: Depression, anxiety, PTSD, shame — mental health support critical
explanation_np: Fraud mental impact: depression, anxiety, PTSD, shame। Counseling: 1166 mental health helpline।

options_np: Victim blaming common — awareness, support systems needed
explanation_np: Victim stigma: common Nepal। Fraud = crime, victim = victim। Support, awareness needed।

options_np: Support groups, advocacy organizations — growing movement
explanation_np: Fraud survivors: support groups forming। Shared experience, advocacy, prevention।

options_np: Civic duty — protect others, deter criminals, improve systems
explanation_np: Reporting fraud: civic responsibility. Protects others, deters criminals, improves systems।

options_np: Prevention cheaper than cure — Rs. 1 prevention saves Rs. 10+ recovery
explanation_np: Fraud prevention ROI: prevention cost < loss + recovery cost। Investment in awareness pays।
Effective fraud prevention: technology (detection) + human judgment + awareness (prevention)।

options_np: AI-powered scams, deepfakes, crypto fraud, sophisticated phishing — evolving
explanation_np: Future fraud: AI scams, deepfakes, crypto manipulation, sophisticated social engineering।

question_np: Fraud awareness — what to teach children?
options_np: Online safety, stranger danger (online), verify before trust, tell trusted adults
explanation_np: Children fraud education: online safety, verify strangers, never share personal info, tell adults।

options_np: Privacy settings, not sharing location, verify online friends, cyberbullying report
explanation_np: Teen online safety: privacy settings, location privacy, verify contacts, cyberbullying report।

options_np: Parental controls, open communication, digital literacy teach, monitor activity
explanation_np: Parents: parental controls, open talk about online risks, digital literacy, monitoring।

options_np: Financial literacy, digital safety, critical thinking — integrate in curriculum
explanation_np: School curriculum: financial literacy (grade 6+), digital safety, critical thinking।

options_np: Employee fraud awareness training — legal, financial, cyber — best practice
explanation_np: Employer responsibility: regular fraud awareness training — all employees।

options_np: Awareness spread, trusted information source, report facilitate — key influencers
explanation_np: Community leaders: trusted fraud awareness sources, facilitate reporting, support victims।

options_np: Limited — awareness programs, law enforcement — increase needed
explanation_np: Government fraud prevention: limited budget। Increased investment needed — prevention > response।

options_np: Multi-agency, technology + human, prevention-focused, victim support — adopt Nepal
explanation_np: Best practice: multi-agency coordination, technology, prevention focus, victim support।

options_np: Educated citizens + strong institutions + technology + cooperation — achievable goal
explanation_np: Fraud-free Nepal: educated aware citizens + strong institutions + technology + cooperation।

question_np: तपाईंको सबैभन्दा important fraud prevention tool के हो?
options_np: आफ्नो ज्ञान र सतर्कता — Awareness is the best weapon
explanation_np: Fraud prevention सबैभन्दा powerful tool: Knowledge + Awareness + Vigilance। तपाईं नै आफ्नो best protector।
